changes_summary: Revised Phase 3 scope per FLAG-001: step 10 now covers every free-text field (Img2Img prompt, custom LoRA URL, plus any others found by grep), not just the main prompt, and explicitly preserves `pendingSettingsRef` / `hasPendingFor` / the loader-side guards at `autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132` — only the per-save edit-version comparator is removed. Revised Phase 2 step 7 per FLAG-002: `EditModePanel` consumes three contexts (form + lightbox-core + variants), and `InlineEditView` currently depends on `stateOverrides.coreState.onClose`. The step now mandates enumerating the full override surface, compares wrapping-in-providers (Path A) vs pure-props (Path B), and picks the smaller diff at implementation time instead of pre-committing to Path A. Success criteria updated to reflect broader prompt-persistence scope and the preserved loader-race logic.
questions: Phase 2 step 7: confirm it's OK to decide Path A vs Path B at implementation time based on diff size, or do you want to pre-commit to one? FLAG-002 suggests Path A is bigger than I initially thought.

Phase 3 step 10: are there free-text fields beyond main prompt, Img2Img prompt, and custom LoRA URL that should also move off per-keystroke autosave? A quick grep will find them but your knowledge is cheaper.

Phase 3 step 10: is 'entity-change cleanup' a reliable close signal for the lightbox in practice, or do we also need an explicit onClose→flush hook? (The cleanup fires on unmount; if the lightbox stays mounted and only visibility toggles, we'd miss it.)

success_criteria.criterion: `LoraSelectorModal.tsx` no longer contains `if (!isOpen) return null;` before the `<Dialog>` return
`PhaseConfigSelectorModal.tsx` no longer contains `if (!isOpen) return null;` before the `<Dialog>` return
`dialog.tsx` has a top-of-file comment documenting the no-early-return-with-open-Dialog rule
`useImageEditForm` exists and throws when its provider is missing; `useImageEditFormSafe` remains only for explicit opt-in callers (or is removed if none exist)
All existing vitest suites for media-lightbox, lora, PhaseConfigSelectorModal, edit-images, and useAutoSaveSettings pass after each phase
Manual user smoke: can type in edit textarea and open model Select after using the LoRA selector (Phase 1 acceptance)
`EditModePanel.tsx` under ~150 lines after Phase 2; mode-specific bodies live in sibling files under `editModes/`
No IIFE-in-JSX blocks remain in `EditModePanel.tsx` after Phase 2
Exactly one source of truth for edit-panel state (props OR context, not both) after Phase 2 step 7, AND InlineEditView's close button still closes the inline editor
`useInpainting.ts` no longer wraps setters with `incomingSet ?? fallbackSet` and no longer holds fallback local state for these fields
EVERY free-text edit field (at minimum: main prompt, Img2Img prompt, custom LoRA URL) writes to Supabase only on blur / generate / lightbox close; sliders and toggles remain debounced
`editVersionRef`, `incrementEditVersion`, and the per-save 'newer edits during save' comparator at `useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts:166-171` are removed
`pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and the loader-side calls at `autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts:61,132` are PRESERVED (load-race protection)
Fast-typing stress test across all three free-text fields with an async entity-settings load in-flight does not lose characters (Phase 3 acceptance)
`useAutoSaveSettings` entity-change transitions go through a single reducer; no render-phase `setSettings` or ref mutations remain across the three previous locations
A lint rule or documented check fires on a fixture containing `if (!open) return null;` immediately before a `<Dialog>` return
Phase 1 ships as a standalone PR and is merged before Phase 2 work begins
No new `.md` files created (CLAUDE.md edit only)

assumptions: Base UI `<Dialog open>` renders nothing heavy when closed at the Portal level; if profiling shows otherwise, `{isOpen && <DialogContent />}` is the fallback.
All four current `useImageEditFormSafe` callsites become strict `useImageEditForm` except a test file that may opt in to `Safe` with a justifying comment.
Phase 2 step 7 path choice (wrap-in-providers vs pure-props) is made during implementation based on diff size; both satisfy the 'one source of truth' criterion.

Every free-text field currently using debounced autosave can be identified by grepping `useGenerationEditSettings` setter callsites — confirmed hits so far are main prompt, Img2Img prompt, custom LoRA URL.
Loader-side `hasPendingFor` and `pendingSettingsRef`/`pendingEntityIdRef` stay; only `editVersionRef` + its comparator are removed in Phase 3.
Phase 3 reducer preserves `useAutoSaveSettings`'s public API and loader interface.
structure_warnings: Each step section should reference at least one file in backticks.
